name: Baked Red Snapper
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup hot and spicy vegetable juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fish in a greased baking pan. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Drizzle lemon juice over the fish.
3. Bake the fish at 350°F for about 10 minutes.
4. In a skillet, sauté onions, green onions, parsley, and butter until fragrant.
5. Add hot and spicy vegetable juice to the skillet and simmer for about 10 minutes.
6. Remove the fish from the oven and drain any excess liquid.
7. Pour the simmered sauce over the fish.
8. Return the fish to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork. Baste occasionally with the sauce.
9. Makes about 6 servings.
180 Calories Per serving.
